steps.title: Read the function value from the ordered pair
steps.content: The ordered pair $(8, 5)$ represents an input-output pair for $f$. This means when the input is 8, the output is 5. By function notation, $f(8) = 5$. That matches the correct answer; A is correct.
steps.formula: $$\text{If } (a, b) \text{ is an input-output pair for } f, \text{ then } f(a) = b$$
